chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1723 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.7411/2023 3. For hearing of main case 21-12-2023 Petitioner is present in person Mr. Aghar Ather Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant Prosecutor General a/w I.O SIP Ali Mardan Lashari of Crime No.588/2023 PS Moro.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Investigating Officer is present submits that he has investigated the matter, in which 164 Cr.P.C statement of the petitioner No.1 has been recorded. She has confirmed divorce from her first husband, which facts he has investigated by recording statements of relevant witnesses and has concluded that petitioner No.1 after divorce from her first husband has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 without any pressure, coercion or compulsion, but with her own accord and free will and she has not been abducted or marry in substances of her first marriage. Therefore, he is in the process of disposing of the case under ‘C’ class and would submit such report. Petitioner No.1 is present who has reiterated the above facts. Accordingly, this petition is allowed with the terms whereby after disposing of the case, the I.O shall submit report before Magistrate concerned, who shall acting on the recommendation of the I.O disposal of the matter in accordance with law. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
